resources.title: Stop trying to build a "God-level agent"
resources.excerpt: Every product and strategy lead is being asked the same question: what is our agent strategy? Almost everyone answers it the same way, by picturing one autonomous, super-powered assistant that does it all. Here is why that is the wrong place to start.

resources.title: Production agents: the hard parts
resources.excerpt: Building an agent that works "perfectly" in a demo is easy. Chris Davison, Head of Agent Delivery, on what actually breaks once real traffic, real tools, and real accountability arrive.

resources.title: Agents make engineering hard again
resources.excerpt: We are nearing the end of the "prompt demo" phase of AI. Matthew Wells, CTO, on why the engineering phase brings all the hard bits back, and why that is good news for engineers.

resources.title: How marketing agencies are rebuilding around AI
resources.excerpt: Most agencies have experimented with AI. There is a meaningful difference between individuals using AI and a business operating on it, and that gap is where the next operating model is being built.

resources.title: Automated company enrichment
resources.excerpt: An integration between Attio CRM and Rightbrain turns a basic company record into a fully enriched, actionable sales and marketing asset, automatically.

resources.title: Sales and ABM workflows in ChatGPT
resources.excerpt: Run structured sales and marketing workflows directly inside ChatGPT by connecting custom Rightbrain Skills over MCP.

resources.title: Automated due diligence
resources.excerpt: Automate document discovery and analysis with a workflow inside GitHub, so your team can handle due diligence without hiring a dedicated risk manager.

resources.title: Partner qualification and outreach
resources.excerpt: Embed Rightbrain in a lightweight Google Sheets workflow to qualify potential partners or customers and generate tailored outreach messaging.

resources.title: How Pal built an AI health coach
resources.excerpt: 15+ AI tools and features power Pal.'s food scanner, nutrition targets, and coaching. Founder and Product Lead Chris runs them all, fixing edge cases, switching models, and shipping daily.

resources.title: Rightbrain web search inside Clay
resources.excerpt: Rocket SaaS built a fully automated audit-to-outreach workflow using Rightbrain inside Clay, so every prospect gets a consistent, structured set of recommendations ready to drop into an email.

resources.title: Every sales call, a content asset
resources.excerpt: Discovery sessions, strategy meetings, podcasts, kick-offs: each call generates market signals, buyer pain points, and content angles. Rightbrain turns them into structured assets, automatically.

resources.title: Automating candidate verification
resources.excerpt: ID checks, right-to-work documentation, and certifications for dozens of placements a week. Rightbrain handles the repetitive checking so recruiters focus on placing people, not chasing paperwork.

resources.title: On-brand product shots in minutes
resources.excerpt: On-brand product imagery is usually slow and expensive. With Rightbrain and Gemini 2.5 Flash you can generate scenes from text, an image, or both.

resources.title: Connect Rightbrain to Clay
resources.excerpt: Connecting Rightbrain to Clay helps you create consistent, structured LLM responses you can reliably reuse across automations and outreach.
